meta.title: FAQ | QS Hub | Quantum Shield
meta.description: Frequently asked questions about QS Hub

whatIsVeQS.question: What is veQS?
whatIsVeQS.answer: veQS (vote-escrowed QS) is a voting power token obtained by locking QS tokens. The longer the lock period, the more veQS you receive, increasing your voting power in governance and reward distribution. veQS is non-transferable and decreases linearly over the lock period.

whyLock.question: Why should I lock QS?
whyLock.answer: By locking QS, you gain the right to participate in protocol decision-making (veQS). Locked users can also receive protocol fee distributions and staking rewards. This mechanism incentivizes long-term holders and enhances protocol stability.

howToLock.question: How do I lock QS?
howToLock.answer:
1. Connect your wallet
2. Select 'Lock' from the Stake menu
3. Enter the amount of QS to lock
4. Choose a lock period (1 week to 4 years)
5. Click 'Lock' and approve the transaction

After locking, you'll receive veQS based on your selected period.

lockDuration.question: How long are lock periods?
lockDuration.answer: You can choose periods from 1 week to 4 years. Longer lock periods earn more veQS. For example, locking 100 QS for 4 years gives you 100 veQS, while locking for 1 year gives you 25 veQS.

earlyUnlock.question: Can I withdraw during the lock period?
earlyUnlock.answer: No, tokens cannot be withdrawn during the lock period. Please wait until the lock period ends. This mechanism ensures protocol stability.

howToVote.question: How do I vote on proposals?
howToVote.answer:
1. Open 'Proposals' from the Vote menu
2. Select a proposal to vote on
3. Review the proposal details
4. Choose 'For' or 'Against'
5. Confirm your vote

You need veQS to vote. Your veQS is not consumed after voting.

delegate.question: What is vote delegation?
delegate.answer: Vote delegation allows you to assign your veQS voting power to another trusted address. Delegation doesn't change your veQS ownership or reward eligibility. You can revoke delegation at any time to vote yourself.

howRewards.question: How are rewards calculated?
howRewards.answer: Rewards are calculated based on your veQS balance's proportion of the total veQS supply. Protocol fees and staking rewards are distributed weekly (per epoch). More veQS means more rewards.

claimRewards.question: How do I claim rewards?
claimRewards.answer:
1. Open the 'Rewards' menu
2. Check your claimable rewards
3. Click the 'Claim' button
4. Approve the transaction

Rewards are updated weekly. Unclaimed rewards accumulate, so you can claim them all at once.

contact.title: Didn't find your answer?
